name: Decorated Christmas Tree
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a full triangular Christmas tree decorated with round ornaments, a string of lights draped in swags, a bright star on top, and a little pile of wrapped presents with bows tucked under its base, standing on a simple tree stand

name: Jolly Santa Claus
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a jolly Santa Claus standing and waving one mittened hand, a big round belly in his fur-trimmed suit, a wide belt, a long curly beard, rosy cheeks, a pointed hat with a fluffy pom-pom, holding a sack of toys over his shoulder

name: Christmas Gingerbread Man
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a cheerful gingerbread man cookie standing with arms out, a wide smiling face with two dot eyes, swirly icing buttons down his front, zigzag icing trim on his arms and legs, and a little bow tie at his neck

name: Christmas Snowman
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a friendly snowman built from three round snowballs, a carrot nose, coal-dot eyes and smile, a chunky knitted scarf around his neck, a top hat, twig arms, and a few falling snowflakes around him

name: Christmas Stocking
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a plump Christmas stocking hanging from a hook, a soft cuff at the top, a candy cane, a small wrapped gift and a star poking out of the opening, with a knitted pattern on the toe and heel

name: Candy Cane Close-Up
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a single large candy cane shown up close, its hooked top curving over, wrapped with a big ribbon bow tied near the curve, and a couple of small holly leaves and berries resting against the base

name: Christmas Wreath
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a round Christmas wreath made of layered pine sprigs, dotted with round berries, small pinecones, and a few ornaments, finished with a large floppy bow at the bottom

name: Santa's Reindeer
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a cute reindeer standing in profile, large branching antlers, a round nose, big gentle eyes, a small jingle-bell collar around its neck, and a holly sprig tucked behind one antler

name: Easy Christmas Ornament
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: one big round Christmas ornament hanging from a simple cap and loop, divided into a few large bands decorated with simple stars, dots, and a wavy stripe, with plenty of open space for easy coloring

name: Santa in His Sleigh
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: Santa Claus riding in a curvy sleigh loaded with a sack of presents, holding the reins, a reindeer pulling at the front, a few stars and a crescent moon in the sky, and a swoosh of motion lines behind them

name: Cute Christmas Penguin
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a chubby cute penguin wearing a tiny Santa hat and a striped scarf, standing on a small mound of snow, holding a single wrapped present in its flippers, with a happy smile and a couple of snowflakes nearby

name: Cozy Christmas Fireplace
subject: holidays/christmas
prompt: a cozy fireplace scene with three stockings hung along the mantel, a crackling fire below, a garland with ornaments draped across the mantel, a framed picture and a clock above, and a couple of presents on the floor beside it
